description_long: This storage box is constructed primarily from wood, featuring a rectangular shape with slightly slanted sides and a flat, broad lid. The front face displays a prominent octagonal metallic plate, likely decorative or functional, while both shorter sides are equipped with metallic ring handles for easy lifting. The wood has a medium brown finish, giving the box a sturdy and utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments such as garages or storage rooms. The lid appears to be a single, solid piece, possibly hinged at the back, and the overall build suggests durability and moderate weight. There are no visible locks or labeling areas, and the surfaces are smooth with a matte finish. The box is designed to rest on the floor and can support additional objects placed on its lid.
description: A medium-sized, brown wooden storage box with a flat lid, metallic ring handles on the sides, and an octagonal plate on the front. The box has a sturdy, utilitarian look and a smooth, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat lid and a central octagonal metallic plate on the box's face.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a metallic ring handle attached to the short side of the box.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned wooden surface with no handles or plates.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also featuring a metallic ring handle similar to the other side.
